stitchFrontmatter.colorFormatNote: The project uses OKLCH as canonical CSS token values, so frontmatter keeps OKLCH and accepts Stitch hex-linter warnings.
stitchFrontmatter.componentPropertyPolicy: DESIGN.md frontmatter uses only supported component sub-token props: backgroundColor, textColor, typography, rounded, padding, height, width, and size.
stitchFrontmatter.sidecarRole: Rings, shadows, borders, focus styles, motion, dark-mode behavior, and responsive rules live in this sidecar.

colorMeta.intent: Calm finance UI with neutral surfaces, emerald primary actions, and broader chart-only color variety.

primary.role: Main action, active navigation, positive product accent

card.role: Grouped financial content and form panels

muted.role: Subtle panels, inactive tabs, quiet grouped backgrounds

guardrails: Keep accent usage below 10% of normal product chrome.
Use chart colors for data visualization, not decorative page sections.
Pair status color with labels, icons, or text.

typographyMeta.primaryStack: -apple-system, "SF Pro Text", "SF Pro Display", Geist, system-ui, sans-serif
typographyMeta.numericRule: Use tabular numerals for balances, rates, deltas, allocation, and totals.

elevation.principle: Use tonal layering, rings, and small shadows before heavy elevation.

levels.raisedCard: shadow-sm with optional hover shadow-lg and small translate on pointer devices
levels.overlay: bg-popover, rounded-xl, ring-1 ring-foreground/10, backdrop only when it improves separation

elevation.glassPolicy: Allowed for persistent navigation and overlays; avoided for financial data cards and forms.

buttonVariants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground, h-8 default, rounded-lg, text-sm font-medium
buttonVariants.outline: border-border bg-background, hover bg-muted, dark border-input and bg-input/30
buttonVariants.ghost: transparent until hover or expanded state
buttonVariants.destructive: destructive tint background with destructive text

componentDetails.focus: Interactive elements use focus-visible border-ring and ring-3 ring-ring/50 unless a destructive state overrides it.
componentDetails.card: Card defaults to rounded-xl, bg-card, text-card-foreground, py-4, gap-4, ring-1 ring-foreground/10.
componentDetails.input: Input defaults to h-8, rounded-lg, border-input, bg-transparent, px-2.5, focus-visible border-ring and ring-3.
componentDetails.loginControls: Auth controls intentionally use 48px height while preserving the same token language.

motion.reducedMotion: Disable decorative transitions, shimmer, hover lift, and view-transition reveals.

mobile: Use safe-area-aware headers and bottom navigation.
Prefer inset grouped lists over tables.
Use bottom sheets for multi-step mobile tasks.
desktop: Expose command search and quick actions without crowding primary data.

componentNotes.buttons: Compact app-shell controls, 48px mobile/auth targets, icon buttons for tools, visible focus rings.
componentNotes.cards: One entity or decision per card, solid surfaces for financial values, subtle rings.
componentNotes.inputs: Explicit labels, semantic autocomplete, accessible validation, localized helper text.
componentNotes.navigation: Adaptive mobile/desktop model with active state contrast and safe-area support.
componentNotes.charts: Color plus labels, legends, tooltips, summaries, and non-color-only status cues.

dos: Use semantic tokens and OKLCH values.
Use Apple system typography with Geist fallback.
Treat empty, loading, error, offline, and reduced-motion states as designed states.
donts: Do not use gradient text for core product UI.
Do not use glassmorphism for financial data cards or forms.
Do not hard-code colors outside tokens except vendor marks.
Do not rely on hover-only affordances or color-only status.
Do not use centered mobile modals for complex tasks.
